hero.title: The ERP & CRM Built for Real-World Manufacturing
hero.subtitle: Stop guessing. Forgio syncs your sales, inventory, and production into one clear dashboard—giving you the data you need to make confident decisions.

value.title: Why Manufacturers Choose Forgio
value.subtitle: Built for Thai manufacturers who demand excellence

clarity.title: Decisions Based on Data
clarity.description: No more spreadsheets or guesswork. Get a real-time view of your business health that you can actually understand.

unified.title: One Source of Truth
unified.description: Consolidate your operations. From customer orders to raw material tracking, everything is connected in one system.

smart.title: Proactive Alerts
smart.description: The system identifies bottlenecks and low stock levels before they become problems, so you can stay ahead of the curve.

pain.title: The Friction Slowing Down Your Growth
pain.intro: You’re working hard, but scattered data is costing you time and money. If you can’t see the 'leaks' in your operations, you can't fix them.

items.data: Data is trapped in Excel, LINE chats, and people's heads.
items.inventory: Stock levels never match reality. You’re either overstocked or running out.
items.sales: Orders are coming in, but production is struggling to keep up.
items.customers: Valuable customer history is lost or buried in messy files.
items.visibility: No real-time overview. You don't know your true profit until the month ends.
items.technology: Previous systems were too complex. Staff didn't use them, so you went back to manual.

what.title: Your Business Navigation System
what.intro: Running a business is like navigating a ship. You need a radar, not just a gut feeling.
what.description: Forgio isn't a magic wand—it’s a precision tool. It shows you exactly where your business stands, where the friction is, and what needs your attention right now. We provide the clarity; you provide the leadership.
what.philosophy: Long-term success isn't built on hype or speed. It's built on making better decisions every single day.

scope.title: Every Function, Fully Integrated
scope.intro: Built for the factory floor and the front office alike. No fluff—just the tools you need to run your business.

sales.title: Sales & Orders
sales.description: Manage POS, quotes, and invoicing with automated payment tracking.

operations.title: Ops & Production
operations.description: Real-time inventory, BOM management, and production status tracking.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.description: Centralized database for leads, history, and follow-up reminders.

people.title: HR & Payroll
people.description: Simplify time-tracking, payroll, and labor cost analysis.

finance.title: Financial Insight
finance.description: Instant P&L reports, cash flow tracking, and tax readiness.

approvals.title: Approvals & Control
approvals.description: Customizable workflows to keep you in control of every major spend.

assistant.title: Smart Assistant: An Extra Pair of Eyes
assistant.description: Forgio’s internal analyzer monitors your operations 24/7. It flags unusual expenses, detects production delays, and alerts you to risks before they impact your bottom line.
assistant.note: It doesn't replace your team; it empowers them with better information.

trust.title: Built from the Factory Floor Up
trust.description: Forgio wasn't built in a vacuum. It was designed by looking at how manufacturers actually operate—prioritizing usability over unnecessary features.
trust.origin: Developed by Brainfried—software should solve problems, not create them.

cta.title: Ready for a Clear View of Your Business?
cta.description: Forgio isn't for every business. But if you're a manufacturer who values precision and a dependable system, let's talk.
cta.trust: Trusted by manufacturing leaders across Thailand

form.title: Request a Callback
form.name: Contact Name
form.success: Received. A specialist will contact you within 24 hours.

hero.title: The Unified Business Operating System
hero.subtitle: From initial quote to final shipment—sync every department and eliminate manual data entry.

sales.feature1: Fast, reliable POS for storefront operations
sales.feature2: Professional quotes and invoices in seconds
sales.feature4: Sales analytics by product, rep, and region

operations.label: Operations

operations.description: Eliminate stockouts and overproduction. Know your true cost-per-unit with real-time material tracking.
operations.feature2: BOM management and precise cost calculation
operations.feature4: Live production progress and Job Order tracking

customers.title: Turn Transactions into Relationships
customers.description: Never forget a client’s specific needs. Give your sales team the context they need to upsell and retain customers.
customers.feature1: Complete purchase history and client profiles
customers.feature2: Interaction logs for calls and meetings
customers.feature4: Loyalty analysis and VIP customer tracking

people.label: People
people.title: Manage Labor and Payroll with Precision
people.description: Connect your payroll directly to your operational costs for a truer picture of your margins.

finance.label: Finance
finance.title: Audit-Ready Financials at Any Moment
finance.description: Stop waiting for month-end summaries. Get a live view of your P&L and cash flow whenever you need it.

approvals.label: Approvals
approvals.title: Maintain Control Without the Bottlenecks
approvals.description: Set clear spending limits and approval chains that keep the business moving without sacrificing oversight.
approvals.feature3: Full audit trails for every decision

assistant.label: Smart Assistant
assistant.title: AI-Driven Insights: See What Matters
assistant.description: We don’t just store data; we help you use it. Our assistant flags the critical issues so you don't have to go looking for them.

insights.title: Sales Trend Analysis
insights.description: Identifies which products are peaking and which are losing momentum.

patterns.title: Anomaly Detection
patterns.description: Alerts you to irregular spending or sudden drops in production efficiency.

alerts.title: High-Priority Alerts
alerts.description: Filters out the noise to notify you only of events that impact profit.

recommendations.title: Actionable Suggestions
recommendations.description: Data-backed advice on reordering, pricing, or following up with leads.

cta.title: See Forgio in Action
cta.description: Book a live demo to see how we can solve your specific operational challenges.

hero.title: Built for the Real World
hero.subtitle: Software should make your work easier, not add another layer of complexity.

story.title: Why Forgio Exists
story.p1: Too many business owners struggle with expensive ERPs that are so hard to use, their staff just goes back to Excel.
story.p2: The problem isn't the users—it's the tools. Most systems are built by people who have never stepped foot on a factory floor.
story.p3: Forgio was built by talking to manufacturers and SMEs to understand their actual workflows. Prioritizing intuition over complexity.
story.p4: Months on the floor, understanding the pain points of managers and operators to create a system that people actually *want* to use.
story.quote: A tool is only useful if it helps you focus on what actually moves the needle.

simplicity.title: Focused Simplicity
simplicity.description: If your team needs a week of training to use it, it’s too complicated. Forgio is built for speed.

trust.title: Data Integrity
trust.description: Accuracy is everything. We provide a system you can rely on for your most critical business audits.

clarity.title: Instant Clarity
clarity.description: No hidden menus. No jargon. Get the information you need in two clicks or less.

longterm.title: Built to Scale
longterm.description: Built for the business you have today, and the one you'll have in five years.

brainfried.title: Brainfried
brainfried.p1: Brainfried builds software that equips SMEs with the same level of technology as global enterprises—without the enterprise price tag.
brainfried.p2: Built with experience across manufacturing, logistics, and retail. Understanding where typical software bottlenecks occur.
brainfried.p3: Small and medium businesses are the backbone of the economy and deserve tools that are as hardworking as they are.
brainfried.mission: Mission: To replace operational chaos with systematic clarity.

name.title: What’s in a Name?
name.p1: Forgio is derived from 'Forge'—the process of shaping something strong and durable under intense conditions.
name.p2: A resilient business is like forged metal; it takes discipline, the right tools, and time. Forgio is that tool.

heat.title: Challenge
heat.description: The market pressures that force you to grow.

pressure.title: Execution
pressure.description: The disciplined actions that shape your success.

time.title: Growth
time.description: The accumulated value of a well-run business.

cta.title: Ready to Systematize Your Growth?
cta.description: Not just software. A partner in operational efficiency.

hero.title: Let’s Talk Business
hero.subtitle: No sales pitch. Just a conversation about your challenges and how we can help.

form.heading: Send Us a Message
form.description: Give us a few details and our team will reach out within 24 hours.

line.heading: LINE Official
line.description: Need a faster response? Reach us on LINE.

email.heading: Email Us
email.description: Send us an email and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

pricing.question: What is the cost?
pricing.answer: We offer flexible plans based on your required features and scale. We'll provide a quote after a brief needs assessment.

demo.question: Can we see a live demo?
demo.answer: Yes. We can schedule a session to walk you through the system using examples relevant to your industry.

implementation.question: How fast can we go live?
implementation.answer: Most businesses are up and running within 2-4 weeks, depending on data readiness.

support.question: What kind of support is provided?
support.answer: You get a dedicated support team for onboarding, training, and ongoing technical assistance.

footer.forgio: Forgio: Real-world business management for modern manufacturers.
